message.content: Read all the markdown files in /app/papers/ and for each file, output the filename followed by the full content. Run: for f in /app/papers/*.md; do echo "=== FILE: $f ==="; cat "$f"; echo; done

input.command: for f in /app/papers/*.md; do echo "=== FILE: $f ==="; cat "$f"; echo; done
input.description: List all markdown files in /app/papers/ with their contents

content.content:
<persisted-output>

=== FILE: /app/papers/PMC10970167.md ===
# PDE4 Gene Family Variants Are Associated with Response to Apremilast Treatment in Psoriasis

## Metadata
**Authors:** Kalliopi Liadaki, Efterpi Zafiriou, Themistoklis Giannoulis, Sofia Alexouda, Kleoniki Chaidaki, Polyxeni Gidarokosta, Angeliki-Viktoria Roussaki-Schulze, Sotirios G Tsiogkas, Athina Daponte, Zissis Mamuris, Dimitrios P Bogdanos, Nicholas K Moschonas, Theologia Sarafidou
**Journal:** Genes
**Date:** 2024 Mar 17
**DOI:** [10.3390/genes15030369](https://doi.org/10.3390/genes15030369)
**PMID:** 38540428
**PMCID:** PMC10970167
**URL:** https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10970167/
**PDF:** [https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10970167/pdf/genes-15-00369.pdf](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10970167/pdf/genes-15-00369.pdf)

## Abstract

Moderate-to-severe psoriasis (Ps) treatment includes systemic drugs and biological agents. Apremilast, a small molecule primarily metabolized by cytochrome CYP3A4, modulates the immune system by specifically inhibiting phosphodiesterase type 4 (PDE4) isoforms and is currently used for the treatment of Ps and psoriatic arthritis (PsA). Clinical trials and real-world data showed variable efficacy in response among Ps patients underlying the need for personalized therapy. This study implements a candidate-gene and a network-based approach to identify genetic markers associated with apremilast response in forty-nine Greek Ps patients. Our data revealed an association of sixty-four SNPs within or near PDE4 and CYP3A4 genes, four SNPs in ncRNAs ANRIL, LINC00941 and miR4706, which influence the abundance or function of PDE4s, and thirty-three SNPs within fourteen genes whose protein products either interact directly with PDE4 proteins or constitute components of the cAMP signaling pathway which is modulated by PDE4s. Notably, fifty-six of the aforementioned SNPs constitute eQTLs for the respective genes in relevant to psoriasis tissues/cells implying that these vari
...
</persisted-output>

**File: `/app/papers/PMC10970167.md`**
- Title: "PDE4 Gene Family Variants Are Associated with Response to Apremilast Treatment in Psoriasis"
- Journal: Genes (2024 Mar 17)
- DOI: 10.3390/genes15030369
- PMID: 38540428
- Summary: A candidate-gene and network-based study identifying genetic markers (SNPs in PDE4, CYP3A4, and related genes) associated with apremilast treatment response in 49 Greek psoriasis patients.

input.command: for f in /app/papers/*.md; do echo "=== FILE: $f ==="; head -30 "$f"; echo "...[truncated]..."; echo; done
input.description: Show first 30 lines of each markdown file for a summary overview
